title: HACK Update container-selinux on host
body: Let's see if this fixes our CI issues.

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

I took at look at regenerating the base images we use (the correct fix) but I've never really worked with GCP before, so I got a little lost. This band-aid will hopefully resolve things until we can get a proper fix worked up.
Hm. Doesn't look like container-selinux is the problem.
Test timed out, not the same error, I am running tests again.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3003) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
